rows.label: tev072501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Nan'celeg about life
on the Ma-non ship.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Nan'celeg if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nan'celeg about the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Nan'celeg about the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0001
rows.name:
There was something quite similar
to those capsule pods where we
were being held by the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0002
rows.name:
But the Ma-non are far beyond the Growth
when it comes to designing for comfort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Not only do the pods here scan for any sign of
ill health in their occupants, but they always
maintain a perfectly comfortable temperature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0004
rows.name:
And you can access a wide variety of
information from the terminals within.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0005
rows.name:
If only there was a way to grow the plants we eat
inside of them, they would be absolutely perfect.
But perhaps that would be asking for too much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0008
rows.name:
May I ask you a question? When you're
in this city, do you feel a clear
connection with your internal Ovah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Lately, I've felt that my own Ovah is
beginning to dull. It can sometimes be
hard to tell what it wants of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What? You humans don't have any
sort of Ovah within you at all?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Th-that's...incredible. We Orphe could
suffer almost any torment, but losing our
Ovah is something we could never endure![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0012
rows.name:
I must say I admire how you're able to act
with such confidence when you're completely
bereft of an Ovah's warmth and guidance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0030
rows.name:
When I'm within this city, the war
with the Growth feels like something
happening on a distant world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0031
rows.name:
So when I heard you had suffered a Growth
attack recently—and was shown footage of
their onslaught, no less—I was terrified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0032
rows.name:
At times like these, my Ovah should
be urging me to replicate myself
out of sheer survival instinct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0033
rows.name:
But my Ovah is silent.
I don't understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0038
rows.name:
My Ovah retains memories of
being held by the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0039
rows.name:
And when I experienced actual
fighting and faced the prospect
of my own death, I was terrified.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0040
rows.name:
At times like these, my Ovah should
be urging me to replicate myself
out of sheer survival instinct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0041
rows.name:
But my Ovah is silent.
I don't understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Nan'celeg about the new Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Nan'celeg about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0024
rows.name:
We're seeing a gradual increase
in individuals like Nen'celeg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0025
rows.name:
For example, Non'barac from the industrial
district is working with Orphe Parfait so
that humans can fight more effectively.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Though they are both the new type of Orphe, we can
see the difference between them in the way Nen'celeg
prioritizes her own intellectual curiosity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0027
rows.name:
I wish Nen'celeg understood that there
are more productive things she could
research than her Union parent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Excuse me, but when you look at
Nen'celeg, do you experience a
cloudy feeling in your chest?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0020
rows.name:
...No? Then this must be some
peculiar characteristic of my own.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0021
rows.name:
Nen'celeg believes this could be an
experience called "love," but I am unsure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0022
rows.name:
All I know is that this unsettling
feeling is getting steadily worse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072501_MSG0023
rows.name:
Dear me. I wonder if we Orphe will
truly be okay if we continue
producing new offspring like this.[ST:wait ]
